title: Wano’s Long Night Begins to Break
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Hiyori, Orochi, Unknown person #8, Luffy, Unknown person #9 as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was always proud to carry my father's name, even when I was starving and covered in Rags!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you, on the other hand, never had a trace of honor!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Every day you were Shogun was one too many!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And as each day passed, more and more lives were lost!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Don't do something you're going to regret!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seeking revenge is a dated ideology, you know!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Besides, killing me makes no difference, Kaido will still be unbelievable!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: This is as far... as I go...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your timing is impeccable!! This is the ideal stage for your real final performance!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's the perfect title for this tragic comedy. Take a look. Hiyori!! A Kozuki Survivor should know that fortune favors the mighty!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Go on! Take her!! Gufuhahaha!! "The failed revenge of a shrew, 20 years in the making!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kanjuro, you [d100ot!! Hiyori, save meee!! It Burrns!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I feel like anything's possible now... I can keep fighting a bit longer.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This is my peak!! This is...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
